metadata.name: Explain Closing Costs to a First-Time Buyer

description: A first-time homebuyer is confused about the estimated closing costs. The agent needs to explain the different fees.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the Loan Estimate document for the buyer's transaction.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the document that lists the estimated closing costs.

nodes.task_description: Break down the major categories of closing costs: lender fees, title/escrow fees, and prepaid items (taxes, insurance).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent categorizes the costs for clarity.

nodes.task_description: Explain the purpose of each major fee in simple, easy-to-understand language.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a clear and patient explanation to the client.
